FAILED_LOGIN.description: Repeated or suspicious failed authentication attempts may indicate password guessing or credential attacks.

MULTIPLE_FAILED_LOGINS.description: Multiple failed login attempts from the same source or against the same user may indicate an active brute force attempt.

POWERSHELL_EXECUTION.description: PowerShell can be used by attackers to execute commands, download tools, or run scripts during an intrusion.

NEW_USER_CREATED.description: Unexpected account creation may indicate an attacker attempting to maintain access to a system.

SUSPICIOUS_DOWNLOAD.description: Suspicious downloads may indicate an attacker transferring tools or payloads into an environment.

PRIVILEGE_CHANGE.description: Privilege or group membership changes may indicate an attempt to strengthen access or maintain persistence.
